summary: Iteration 144: Tested Pkts→Bags rename, RST auto-fill with bags, notification badge, and AWE action buttons. All 14 backend tests passed. All 5 frontend tests passed.
seed_data_creation: Created test VW entries during CRUD tests, cleaned up after each test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 144 verified: 1) Pkts renamed to Bags in VW table header - VERIFIED. 2) Pkts renamed to Bags in AWE table header - VERIFIED. 3) Photo View dialog shows 'Bags / बोरे' - VERIFIED. 4) RST auto-fill includes bags field (tot_pkts → bag) - VERIFIED via API test. 5) Notification badge on AWE tab shows pending count (2 shown during test) - VERIFIED. 6) GET /api/vehicle-weight/linked-rst returns linked RSTs - VERIFIED. 7) AWE has full action buttons (View, Edit, Print, Download, Delete, Linked-Checkmark) - VERIFIED. 8) Excel export has 'Bags' header (line 788 in vehicle_weight.py) - CODE VERIFIED. 9) PDF export has 'Bags' header (line 858 in vehicle_weight.py) - CODE VERIFIED.
